olliekicker270526.title: Ollie off Kicker on Elevation
olliekicker270526.desc: Something I’ve picked up more recently, getting used to how I need to pump when rolling up to jump up a kicker. Front foot position and getting the front foot high and in enough is an issue thats limiting the height of this, as well as speed and pump strength. I need to work on changing foot position when at high speed, as its whats stopping me from getting my front foot in the right place. Is something thats currently part of my drills when skateboarding, don’t be surprised if another video rocks up of me getting significantly more height from ollie-ing of a kicker later down the line once my competence with this builds up more.

manfullcab210526.title: Manual Full Cab on Triangle
manfullcab210526.desc: Recorded later at night when looking to do something less intensive. Can’t seem to do these going in regular but can do it going in fakie, probably means my weight disto. is all wrong. Had approx. 5 attempts before recording to get it down, got it first time when recording. I need to work on manualing this obstacle more just to build up my turns and manualing over uneven surfaces.
